subtitle.en: When a planet ventures too close to the Sun, it becomes invisible  –  swallowed by the Sun's radiance. This ancient observation forms the basis of one of Vedic astrology's most important planetary conditions.
subtitle.hi: जब कोई ग्रह सूर्य के अत्यधिक निकट आता है, वह अदृश्य हो जाता है  –  सूर्य की दीप्ति में विलीन। यह प्राचीन अवलोकन वैदिक ज्योतिष की सबसे महत्वपूर्ण ग्रह अवस्थाओं का आधार है।
subtitle.ta: When a planet ventures too close to the Sun, it becomes invisible  –  swallowed by the Sun's radiance. This ancient observation forms the basis of one of Vedic astrology's most important planetary conditions.
subtitle.te: When a planet ventures too close to the Sun, it becomes invisible  –  swallowed by the Sun's radiance. This ancient observation forms the basis of one of Vedic astrology's most important planetary conditions.

whatP1.en: When a planet gets too close to the Sun in longitude, it becomes invisible from Earth  –  literally "burned" by the Sun's light. The planet's significations become OVERSHADOWED by the Sun's ego and authority. This is called Asta (combustion) in Jyotish.
whatP1.hi: जब कोई ग्रह देशान्तर में सूर्य के बहुत निकट आता है, वह पृथ्वी से अदृश्य हो जाता है। ग्रह के कारकत्व सूर्य के अहंकार और अधिकार से आच्छादित हो जाते हैं। इसे ज्योतिष में अस्त कहते हैं।
whatP1.ta: When a planet gets too close to the Sun in longitude, it becomes invisible from Earth  –  literally "burned" by the Sun's light. The planet's significations become OVERSHADOWED by the Sun's ego and authority. This is called Asta (combustion) in Jyotish.

whatP2.en: Combustion weakens the planet but does not destroy it. Think of a brilliant minister who cannot speak freely because the king dominates every conversation. Retrograde planets have SMALLER combustion distances because they are stronger.
whatP2.hi: दाह ग्रह को दुर्बल करता है परन्तु नष्ट नहीं करता। वक्री ग्रहों की दाह दूरी कम होती है क्योंकि वे अधिक बलवान होते हैं।
whatP2.ta: Combustion weakens the planet but does not destroy it. Think of a brilliant minister who cannot speak freely because the king dominates every conversation. Retrograde planets have SMALLER combustion distances because they are stronger.

effectsTitle.hi: अस्त होने पर प्रत्येक ग्रह का प्रभाव

vsP1.en: Combustion is NOT the same as debilitation. A combust Jupiter in Cancer (exalted) is still exalted  –  just overshadowed.
vsP1.hi: अस्त नीचत्व के समान नहीं है। कर्क में अस्त गुरु (उच्च) अभी भी उच्च है  –  बस आच्छादित।
vsP1.ta: Combustion is NOT the same as debilitation. A combust Jupiter in Cancer (exalted) is still exalted  –  just overshadowed.
vsP1.te: Combustion is NOT the same as debilitation. A combust Jupiter in Cancer (exalted) is still exalted  –  just overshadowed.

vsP1.mai: Combustion is NOT the same as debilitation. A combust Jupiter in Cancer (exalted) is still exalted  –  just overshadowed.

vsP2.en: In a natal chart, combustion is permanent but can be mitigated with remedies. Our engine marks combust planets with a flame icon.
vsP2.hi: जन्म कुण्डली में अस्त स्थायी है परन्तु उपायों से शमन किया जा सकता है। हमारा इंजन अस्त ग्रहों को अग्नि चिह्न से दर्शाता है।

combustionDist.hi: दूरी अंशों में (° देशान्तर)  –  R = वक्री दूरी
